issues.description: RevealFromHand is incorrect. Effect specifies 'place 3 Navy type cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck' — this is a deck/trash manipulation, not a hand reveal. Should use SearchDeck or equivalent trash-to-deck action.
Missing condition check: 'if there is a Character with a cost of 9 or more' must be evaluated before KO action. The second KO action should be conditional on this board state check.
KO action lacks conditional gate. Text states 'if there is a Character with a cost of 9 or more' — this condition must wrap the KO, not execute unconditionally.
AttachDon should specify 'rested' state as a filter/requirement per card text 'rested DON!! card'.
